name: Cod Piccata
tagline: Pan-seared cod in lemon-caper butter sauce — Italian-American classic
highlight: Lemon, capers, butter — bright and salty, no shellfish

hero.alt: Cod piccata in lemon caper sauce with parsley
hero.caption: cod piccata — lemon-caper-butter

healthFacts: Cod is among the leanest fish — ~20g protein per fillet, low fat.
Capers are fermented; small dose of probiotic compounds.

steps.title: Dredge and sear
steps.detail: Pat cod dry, salt and pepper. Dredge in flour, shake excess. Sear in olive oil + 1 tbsp butter over medium-high 3 min per side until just cooked. Set aside.
steps.tip: Flour gives crust + thickens sauce later. Don't skip.

steps.title: Bloom garlic
steps.detail: In the same pan, add 1 tbsp butter, sliced garlic. Cook 30 sec until just fragrant.
steps.tip: Don't brown the garlic. Pale gold = right.

steps.title: Deglaze and reduce
steps.detail: Pour in wine and lemon juice; scrape the fond. Add capers; reduce 2 min until slightly syrupy.
steps.tip: Capers carry their own salt — taste before adding more.

steps.title: Mount with butter
steps.detail: Off heat, swirl in remaining 2 tbsp butter. Return fish briefly to coat. Shower with parsley.
steps.tip: Off heat is critical — boiling makes butter sauce break.
